zh.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla是Mr Harcla的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla是Mr Harcla的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla was born as the son of Mr Harcla. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla est né, fils de Mr Harcla. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla wurde, als Sohn von Mr Harcla geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla è nato il come figlio di Mr Harcla. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de HarclaはMr Harclaの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla(은)는 Mr Harcla의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla nasceu filho de Mr Harcla. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla родился. Его отца звали Mr Harcla. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Walter de Harcla nació como hijo de Mr Harcla. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
